rationale: The citing paper develops a joint model of sentiment and venue-format choice and explicitly compares against sequential alternatives, while the cited paper is a two-stage choice model with stage-specific decision rules—so a methodological/foundational link is plausible. However, the provided match evidence is only a single DOI reference with no in-text citation context or described usage. Given this sparse evidence, it cannot be safely dropped but is not strong enough to clearly keep.
